name: New Mexico Style Barbecue Sauce (Gc)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter.
2. Add the onion and garlic; sweat until translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the tomatoes and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Incorporate the remaining ingredients and continue to simmer for another 20 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and puree the mixture using a food processor or blender.
6. Pour into a bowl and let cool at room temperature.
7. The sauce will keep for up to one week at room temperature or several months in the freezer.
